content.rendered:
🚀 Join WagerGeeks as a Business Development Executive (BDE)!
📍 Location : Remote
🕒 Experience : 2–3+ Years
💼 Industry : IT & iGaming

Are you a go-getter who thrives on winning projects, closing deals, and driving growth?
At WagerGeeks, we’re searching for a Business Development Executive (BDE) who understands the art of freelancing platforms, knows how to bid smartly, and can bring consistent business from global clients in IT & iGaming.

🔑 Your Role:

  • Proactively hunt for new business opportunities across IT & iGaming.
  • Manage and bid effectively on platforms like Upwork, Freelancer, Fiverr, PeoplePerHour, and others.
  • Generate high-quality leads and convert them into long-term clients.
  • Craft compelling proposals & presentations that stand out from the competition.
  • Collaborate with delivery teams to align client requirements with solutions.
  • Develop strategies to achieve monthly & quarterly sales targets.
  • Build and maintain strong client relationships across geographies.
  • Stay up to date with IT trends, SaaS, and latest technologies to strengthen pitches.

👤 Who You Are:

  • 2–3+ years in business development / bidding on freelance platforms.
  • Strong knowledge of IT services, SaaS, and digital technologies.
  • Proven track record of winning projects on Upwork, Freelancer, Fiverr, etc.
  • Excellent proposal writing, negotiation, and communication skills.
  • Goal-driven, self-motivated, and able to work independently.
  • Familiarity with the iGaming industry is a strong plus.
  • Bachelor’s degree in Business/IT or relevant experience preferred.

🌟 Why WagerGeeks?

  • 💰 Competitive salary + performance-based commissions & incentives.
  • 🏡 100% remote – work from anywhere with flexibility.
  • 🚀 Be part of a fast-growing company in IT & iGaming.
  • 🌍 Exposure to global markets, diverse clients & exciting projects.
  • 🤝 Collaborative, growth-oriented, and supportive work culture.

📩 How to Apply:
Send your CV & a short cover note highlighting your freelance bidding experience to:
hr@wagergeeks.com

💡 Know someone who’s great at Upwork/Freelancer bidding? Tag or share this with them!
